name: Icon Group Dark
description: A professional theme for Visual Studio Code inspired by Icon Group's brand identity. Features navy blue backgrounds, gold accents, and healthcare-focused aesthetics with purple, green, and yellow highlights reflecting Icon Group's commitment to cancer care.
